NCT02742454.label: Outcome
NCT02742454.text: To estimate the association between study group and outcome, data were analyzed using the stratified Cochran-Mantel-Haenszel test for relative risk (RR), with associations summarized by point estimates and 95% CIs.

NCT04299425.label: Outcome
NCT04299425.text: The mean number of PGs identified during parathyroidectomy was not significantly higher when using NIRAF for focused procedures (mean, NIRAF, 1.6; 95% CI, 1.4-1.8 vs control, 1.5; 95% CI, 1.4-1.7).
